name: Grade 8 Automotive & Mechanics — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 8 pathway for synthesizing sources, designing solutions, and defending conclusions through Automotive & Mechanics. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 8 knowledge and transferable skills in synthesizing sources, designing solutions, and defending conclusions through Automotive & Mechanics.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.title: Launch inquiry: synthesizing sources, designing solutions, and defending conclusions through Automotive & Mechanics
lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about synthesizing sources, designing solutions, and defending conclusions through Automotive & Mechanics and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.
